positive: A symmetrical and highly detailed celestial mandala design, featuring intricate geometric patterns merging with stylized cosmic elements like nebulae, constellations, and crescent moons. The central composition should be a stylized phoenix rising from abstract stellar dust, rendered with sharp, graphic linework. Use a color palette dominated by deep indigo, vibrant turquoise, and radiant gold leaf accents, contrasting against a matte black background. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau etching and modern spiritual geometry, ensuring clean lines, high contrast, and a centralized, repeat-ready composition suitable for screen printing on apparel. Focus on clean, easily identifiable silhouettes and strong radial symmetry.
negative: low resolution, blurry, washed out, noisy, text, signature, watermark, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, muted colors, gradient fade, dirty, messy
